accurate.why: All claims match bill text; does not add content about reclassification but also does not misstate anything.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; Fed. Reg. cite and date match bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies this as a CRA disapproval of the FWS northern long-eared bat rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the rule would have no force or effect and correctly observes no ESA amendment is made.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers disapproval, Fed. Reg. cite, and operative effect.

concise.why: Appropriately brief and to the point.

correct_entities.why: U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: 87 Fed. Reg. 73488 and November 30, 2022 match bill text.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
